message:
test: add unit and E2E tests for Spec Evolution Compare module

Add comprehensive test coverage for the spec-evolution-compare library:

Unit tests (tests/spec-evolution-compare.test.ts):
- Tests for indexSpecFiles: slug extraction, date ordering, filtering
- Tests for computeTextStats: word/line/char counts
- Tests for computeEditDistanceLines: edit distance calculation between
  spec versions
- Tests for computeFileChangeSummary: addition/removal/change metrics
- Tests for myersDiffTextLines and myersDiffLines: Myers diff algorithm
  correctness for both text and structured line inputs
- Tests for buildCorpusText: corpus aggregation across spec files

E2E tests (tests/spec-evolution-compare-e2e.spec.ts):
- Playwright smoke tests that navigate to the Spec Evolution Lab page
- Console event capture with JSONL diagnostic logging to
  test-results/logs/ for post-mortem debugging
- Verifies the page loads without React errors or hydration mismatches
- Validates that key UI elements (timeline, diff viewer) render

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
